prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科组最低位次约10947→5348→11083→13708→33715，波动极大；2022年异常前移至5348，2023年恢复至11083，2024年继续后移至13708，2025年骤降 至33715，单年后移约20007名，呈现断档式下滑；该校在甘肃省理科组招生计划2021年47人、2022年48人、2023年46人、2024年52人、2025年56人，呈稳步扩招 趋势；2026年计划增至62人，较2025年扩招约10.7%，扩招幅度中等。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 辽宁大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第125名，近年 排名在124–131名之间波动，整体稳定；该校在2021–2026年声誉数据中未被收录，无显著正面或负面舆情事件；抖音热度排名第105位，评价为“一般”，短视频 平台曝光量较低；未见投档线断档或异常记录，但2025年位次骤降可能反映报考热度阶段性走低；第五轮学科评估中，应用经济学获评A-，为该校唯一A-及以上 学科；计算机类、电子信息类等理科招生专业虽无A级学科支撑，但社会热度较高。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类2024年推荐，电子信息/通信2024年高热推荐，电气工程及其自动化2024年高热推荐，工科类专业整体热度较高；甘肃省2026年物理类估算约145654人，较2025年121443人增长约19.9%，考生规模明显扩大，竞争加剧；辽宁大学位于辽宁省沈阳市，距甘肃省较远，属跨省报考。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次断档式下滑（33 715）、2026年招生计划扩招（+10.7%）以及物理类考生规模扩大（+19.9%）等因素，2025年位次异常偏低预计在2026年有一定修复（位次前移）；，考虑断档修复效应下调500名，预测2026年理科组最低位次约35383名，区间34883–35883名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the science group was approximately 10947 → 5348 → 11083 → 13708 → 33715, showing extreme fluctuations; in 2022, it anomalously moved forward to 5348, recovered to 11083 in 2023, continued to move back to 13708 in 2024, and plummeted to 33715 in 2025, with a single-year backward shift of about 20007 places, indicating a gap-style decline; the university's enrollment plan for the science group in Gansu Province was 47 in 2021, 48 in 2022, 46 in 2023, 52 in 2024, and 56 in 2025, showing a steady expansion trend; the 2026 plan increases to 62, an expansion of about 10.7% compared to 2025, a moderate expansion rate.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Liaoning University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 125th, with recent rankings fluctuating between 124 and 131, overall stable; the university's reputation data from 2021 to 2026 is not included, with no significant positive or negative public opinion events; Douyin popularity ranking is 105th, rated as 'average', with low exposure on short video platforms; no records of gaps or anomalies in admission lines, but the sharp decline in 2025 ranking may reflect a temporary decrease in application enthusiasm; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Applied Economics received an A-, the only A- or above discipline at the university; although computer and electronic information science majors lack A-level discipline support, they have high social popularity.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science was recommended in 2024, Electronic Information/Communication was highly recommended in 2024, Electrical Engineering and Automation was highly recommended in 2024, and engineering majors overall have high popularity; the estimated number of physics category students in Gansu Province in 2026 is about 145,654, an increase of about 19.9% from 121,443 in 2025, significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying competition; Liaoning University is located in Shenyang City, Liaoning Province, far from Gansu Province, making it a cross-province application.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the gap-style decline in 2025 ranking (33,715), the expansion of enrollment plan in 2026 (+10.7%), and the increase in physics category candidates (+19.9%), the abnormally low ranking in 2025 is expected to recover somewhat in 2026 (ranking moving forward); taking into account the gap repair effect, a reduction of 500 places is applied, predicting the minimum ranking for the science group in 2026 to be approximately 35,383, with a range of 34,883 to 35,883.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 34,883–35,883, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, Tier 1 majors as sprint targets, and Tier 3 majors as safety choices; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<34,883), you can focus on sprinting for popular engineering majors such as Computer Science and Technology and Data Science and Big Data Technology; if your ranking is close to the upper limit (>35,883), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 management or environmental majors to ensure admission.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the liberal arts group was approximately 1913 → 2954 → 3345 → 2143 → 4038, showing an overall fluctuating and declining trend; after a temporary rebound to 2143 in 2024, it significantly dropped to 4038 in 2025, with a recent decline of about 1895 positions and large fluctuations; the enrollment plan for this university in Gansu Province's liberal arts group was 39 in 2021, 38 in 2022, 38 in 2023, 35 in 2024, and 31 in 2025, showing a year-on-year decreasing trend; the 2026 plan increases to 39, an expansion of about 25.8% compared to 2025, which is significant and helps alleviate competition to some extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Liaoning University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking is approximately 125th in 2026, fluctuating between 124 and 131 in recent years, overall stable; the university was not included in reputation data from 2021 to 2026, with no significant positive or negative public opinion events; its Douyin popularity ranking is 105th, rated as 'average', with low exposure on short video platforms, not forming a clear signal of application popularity; no records of admission cutoff line breaks or anomalies; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Applied Economics was rated A-, the only A- or above discipline; economics/finance-related majors have some appeal in admissions, but the overall number of advantageous disciplines is limited.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of finance/finance/economics majors shows a 'differentiated wait-and-see' trend; in 2024, compared to 2023, there was a slight warming but overall differentiation; the total number of Gansu Province college entrance examination candidates in 2026 is about 218,700, an increase of about 21.6% from 179,817 in 2025; the estimated number of history category candidates is about 73,046, an increase of about 25.1% from 58,374 in 2025, with a significant expansion of the candidate pool and intensified competition; Liaoning University is located in Shenyang City, Liaoning Province, far from Gansu Province, making it a cross-province application.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the significant decline in 2025 rankings, the notable expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (+25.8%), and the increase in Gansu Province's history category candidates (+25.1%), the expansion and candidate increase largely offset each other; taking into account the intensified competition among candidates, a slight downward adjustment is made, predicting the minimum ranking for the 2026 liberal arts group to be approximately 4633, with a range of 4133–5133.
